_README: List of customer photos / unboxing videos / testimonials shown in the #InkAndChaiBookstagram strip on EVERY product page. Add real content as you collect it — one entry per card. Empty list = section hidden. See bottom of file for the schema.

_schema.src: Path under /public (e.g. /videos/unboxing-hindi-bestsellers.mp4) OR full https:// URL
_schema.poster: Optional thumbnail for video cards (path or URL). Picked up from first frame if omitted.
_schema.caption: Short 1-line caption shown over the card (e.g. 'Anjali · Pune · Hindi self-help haul')
_schema.instagram: Optional Instagram permalink — adds an 'View on Instagram' chip
